item.title: When she was 23, Rosemary Kennedy, the sister of JFK and RFK, had a forced lobotomy arranged by her father. The surgery left her incapacitated for the rest of her life.

item.title: In Mongolia, the horse population significantly outnumbers the human population, with a ratio of approximately 3:1. There's a Mongolian saying, "A Man without a Horse is like a Bird without Wings". ( video )
item.description: In Mongolia, the horse population significantly outnumbers the human population, with a ratio of approximately 3:1. There's a Mongolian saying, "A Man without a Horse is like a Bird without Wings".
